creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your PR. I think, you are right with using
<bsd.port.options.mk>. It seems to work as aspected.

I decided to open a new PR ports/185559 with a bigger patch to also
unbreak the build of math/saga on 10.0 and higher. This new patch
includes yours.

Thanks again,
Rainer Hurling
